title: Get in touch - Nick Smith MP - Blaenau Gwent & Rhymney - Nick Smith MP
meta_description: Labour MP for Blaenau Gwent & Rhymney
headings: h2: Follow Nick Smith on social media
text_excerpt: Get in touch - Nick Smith MP - Blaenau Gwent & Rhymney - Nick Smith MP Skip to main content Nick Smith MP Labour MP for Blaenau Gwent & Rhymney Join Get Involved Donate Get in touch Contact details Your Privacy More Search Search the website Search Menu Get in touch Nick Smith MP Labour MP for Blaenau Gwent & Rhymney Address 23 Beaufort Street, Brynmawr, Ebbw Vale NP23 4AQ, UK View on Google Maps Telephone 01495 313167 Email nick.smith.mp@parliament.uk Follow Nick Smith on social media When you contact me, please ensure that you include your own contact details including your postal address so I can respond effectively. If you have a casework reference number, please also include this so my team can help you as swiftly as possible. If your query is about policy, I endeavour to respond within two weeks though this may not always be possible. For more information on how your data is stored, protected and used, please go to the Your Privacy page. Nick Smith MP Contact details 23 Beaufort Street, Brynmawr, Ebbw Vale NP23 4AQ, UK View on Google Maps Email: nick.smith.mp@parliament.uk Further details Promoted by Alyson Tippings on behalf of Nick Smith for Blaenau Gwent & Rhymney, both at 23 Beaufort Street, Brynmawr. ©2026 Copyright Labour All rights reserved.
